buildCommand: npm run build && cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://accounts.google.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://accounts.google.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
